image_source.selection_reason: bishengjdk-8 README.md 说明支持 Linux/AArch64 和 Linux/x86_64 平台。使用 openEuler 24.03 LTS 官方容器镜像，在容器内按源码构建指南编译。

recommended_image.value: README.md 指引查看 Wiki 构建说明 (https://gitcode.com/openeuler/bishengjdk-8/wiki/毕昇JDK8_源码构建说明.md)。构建通过 bishengjdk-build 框架的 build.sh 脚本编排，需要 Boot JDK 8 和 GCC 工具链。

value.original: yum install -y autoconf gcc-c++ libXtst-devel libXt-devel libXrender-devel libXrandr-devel libXi-devel cups-devel freetype-devel alsa-lib-devel unzip fontconfig-devel
value.openEuler_equivalent: dnf install -y autoconf gcc-c++ libXtst-devel libXt-devel libXrender-devel libXrandr-devel libXi-devel cups-devel freetype-devel alsa-lib-devel unzip fontconfig-devel

value.original: yum install -y java-1.8.0-openjdk-devel (boot JDK when not specified)
yum install -y openssl-devel (aarch64 额外依赖)

value: libXtst-devel, libXt-devel, libXrender-devel, libXrandr-devel, libXi-devel (X11 图形库)

build_commands.source: bishengjdk-build/sbin/buildjdk.sh BuildJDK 函数 + Makefile help 目标

ut_commands.source: Makefile help 目标 - make test
ut_commands.value: make test TEST="jdk_core langtools_jtreg" (需要 jtreg 测试框架)

execution_log.output: 容器 bishengjdk-8-ttfhw 启动成功 (fb53e130f351)

execution_log.command: dnf install -y gcc-c++ autoconf cups-devel freetype-devel alsa-lib-devel fontconfig-devel unzip libXtst-devel libXt-devel libXrender-devel libXrandr-devel libXi-devel java-1.8.0-openjdk-devel openssl-devel
execution_log.output: 安装 200+ 个软件包，包括 GCC 12.3.1, OpenJDK 1.8.0_462, X11 开发库，CUPS, FreeType, ALSA 等
配置成功创建于 /workspace/build/linux-aarch64-normal-server-release。检测到 256 核 CPU, 2093412 MB 内存。Boot JDK: OpenJDK 1.8.0_462 (BiSheng)。工具链: GCC 12.3.1。
构建成功完成。各组件构建时间: corba 9s, demos 3s, hotspot 53s, images 10s, jaxp 9s, jaxws 11s, jdk 71s, langtools 18s, nashorn 8s。总计 193 秒。产物: j2sdk-image (620M), j2re-image (468M)。
java version "1.8.0_492"。HelloWorld 编译运行成功，输出: java.version=1.8.0_492, java.vendor=Oracle Corporation, os.arch=aarch64

documentation_gaps: Wiki 构建说明页面 (https://gitcode.com/openeuler/bishengjdk-8/wiki/毕昇JDK8_源码构建说明.md) 无法直接访问
doc/building.md 为空文件，构建文档不完整
README.md 仅包含基本介绍，构建说明完全依赖外部 Wiki 链接
bishengjdk-build 构建框架的 build.sh 脚本依赖 4 个独立子脚本 (init_info.sh, prepare.sh, buildjdk.sh, testjdk.sh)，需要单独克隆 bishengjdk-build 仓库
缺少 devcontainer 配置，开发者需要手动搭建构建环境

problems_encountered.problem: 构建系统依赖外部 bishengjdk-build 框架，但 README 未说明如何获取
problems_encountered.resolution: 直接解析 bishengjdk-build/sbin/prepare.sh 和 buildjdk.sh 获取依赖列表和构建参数

problems_encountered.problem: configure 自动检测 256 核并限制为 16 并行任务
problems_encountered.resolution: 显式传递 JOBS=51 (CPU 核数 × 20%) 覆盖默认值，实际编译使用 51 并行任务
